claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch API and schema already support research/fetch style evidence with proper scope separation between external and project facts. The implementation has defense-in-depth validation that prevents external research from being accepted as project facts.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES defined with four scopes: project, external, user, unknown. Cross-checker evidence verified.
evidence.why: Core schema boundary defining all valid evidence scopes.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeErrors function validates each evidence record has a valid scope declaration. Cross-checker evidence verified.
evidence.why: Pre-validation logic that detects scope violations before normalization.

evidence.summary: Agent prompt mandates scope declaration, project evidence requires repo-relative path, WebFetch/WebSearch marked as scope=external. Cross-checker evidence verified.
evidence.why: Main enforcement point for scope separation in evidence protocol contract.

evidence.summary: normalizeAgentResult calls evidenceScopeErrors and blocks with EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED if scope errors exist. Cross-checker evidence verified.
evidence.why: Critical runtime enforcement: evidence without valid scope is blocked.

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope infers scope from record fields and normalizes web/internet/research to external. Cross-checker evidence verified.
evidence.why: Scope inference and normalization layer supporting flexible record formats.

evidence.summary: evidenceScopeDeclarationIssues validates declared scope and returns EVIDENCE_SCOPE_REQUIRED blocker. Cross-checker evidence verified.
evidence.why: Readiness validation enforcing scope declaration requirements.

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues validates project-scoped claims have project evidence with concrete locators. Cross-checker evidence verified.
evidence.why: Enforces project facts require project-scoped evidence with repo-relative paths.

evidence.summary: Doctrine states evidence records must declare scope, project evidence requires repo-relative path, external evidence cannot prove project facts. Cross-checker evidence verified.
evidence.why: Product-level specification codifying scope separation requirement.

risks: Explorer agent failed with JSON parse error, but cross-checker successfully verified all claims with independent evidence paths.
Minor line number discrepancy in cross-checker evidence (docs line 70 vs line 70 reference), but content verified.

result.notes: Verification complete. Cross-checker provided 8 evidence records with accurate paths and line numbers. All evidence sources verified from primary code/docs. No assumptions promoted to facts. No unresolved missing data. Defense-in-depth implementation confirmed across prompt contract, pre-validation, runtime blocking, scope inference, readiness validation, and doctrine specification. Explorer failure due to JSON parse error does not affect evidence quality; cross-checker successfully verified the claim.
